import os
import modal
import numpy as np
from fastapi import Request

app = modal.App("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint")

image = modal.Image.debian_slim().pip_install("numpy", "fastapi")
vol = modal.Volume.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-vol", create_if_missing=True)
output_dict = modal.Dict.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-output", create_if_missing=True)
secret = modal.Secret.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-secret")

@app.cls(
    image=image,
    volumes={"/checkpoints": vol},
    secrets=[secret],
    keep_warm=2
)
class ModelServer:
    @modal.enter()
    def load_model(self):
        self.model_path = "/checkpoints/model.npy"
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(self.model_path), exist_ok=True)
        
        if os.path.exists(self.model_path):
            self.model = np.load(self.model_path)
            print("Loaded model from checkpoint")
        else:
            self.model = np.random.rand(10, 10)
            np.save(self.model_path, self.model)
            vol.commit()
            print("Initialized new model and saved checkpoint")
            
        self.model_version = os.environ.get("MODEL_VERSION", "unknown")
        self.auth_token = os.environ.get("AUTH_TOKEN", "unknown")

    @modal.web_endpoint(method="POST")
    def predict(self, data: dict):
        inputs = np.array(data.get("inputs", []))
        prediction = float(np.sum(inputs)) + float(np.sum(self.model))
        return {
            "prediction": prediction,
            "model_version": self.model_version,
            "auth_token_present": bool(self.auth_token)
        }

@app.function(image=image, volumes={"/checkpoints": vol})
def save_dummy_model():
    os.makedirs("/checkpoints", exist_ok=True)
    dummy = np.ones((10, 10))
    np.save("/checkpoints/model.npy", dummy)
    vol.commit()

@app.local_entrypoint()
def main():
    print("Saving dummy model checkpoint to volume...")
    save_dummy_model.remote()
    
    print("Performing test inference call...")
    server = ModelServer()
    res = server.predict.remote({"inputs": [1, 2, 3]})
    print("Inference result:", res)
    
    print("Populating operational metadata...")
    output_dict["model_version"] = "v1.0.0"
    output_dict["checkpoint_saved"] = "true"
    output_dict["endpoint_ready"] = "true"
    output_dict["warm_pool_size"] = "2"
    print("Done!")

import os
import modal

app = modal.App("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint")

image = modal.Image.debian_slim().pip_install("numpy", "fastapi")
vol = modal.Volume.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-vol", create_if_missing=True)
output_dict = modal.Dict.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-output", create_if_missing=True)
secret = modal.Secret.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-secret")

@app.cls(
    image=image,
    volumes={"/checkpoints": vol},
    secrets=[secret],
    min_containers=2
)
class ModelServer:
    @modal.enter()
    def load_model(self):
        import numpy as np
        self.model_path = "/checkpoints/model.npy"
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(self.model_path), exist_ok=True)
        
        if os.path.exists(self.model_path):
            self.model = np.load(self.model_path)
            print("Loaded model from checkpoint")
        else:
            self.model = np.random.rand(10, 10)
            np.save(self.model_path, self.model)
            vol.commit()
            print("Initialized new model and saved checkpoint")
            
        self.model_version = os.environ.get("MODEL_VERSION", "unknown")
        self.auth_token = os.environ.get("AUTH_TOKEN", "unknown")

    @modal.fastapi_endpoint(method="POST")
    def predict(self, data: dict):
        import numpy as np
        inputs = np.array(data.get("inputs", []))
        prediction = float(np.sum(inputs)) + float(np.sum(self.model))
        return {
            "prediction": prediction,
            "model_version": self.model_version,
            "auth_token_present": bool(self.auth_token)
        }

@app.function(image=image, volumes={"/checkpoints": vol})
def save_dummy_model():
    import numpy as np
    os.makedirs("/checkpoints", exist_ok=True)
    dummy = np.ones((10, 10))
    np.save("/checkpoints/model.npy", dummy)
    vol.commit()

@app.local_entrypoint()
def main():
    print("Saving dummy model checkpoint to volume...")
    save_dummy_model.remote()
    
    print("Performing test inference call...")
    server = ModelServer()
    res = server.predict.remote({"inputs": [1, 2, 3]})
    print("Inference result:", res)
    
    print("Populating operational metadata...")
    output_dict["model_version"] = "v1.0.0"
    output_dict["checkpoint_saved"] = "true"
    output_dict["endpoint_ready"] = "true"
    output_dict["warm_pool_size"] = "2"
    print("Done!")

import os
import modal
import json
import urllib.request

app = modal.App("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint")

image = modal.Image.debian_slim().pip_install("numpy", "fastapi")
vol = modal.Volume.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-vol", create_if_missing=True)
output_dict = modal.Dict.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-output", create_if_missing=True)
secret = modal.Secret.from_name("ml-serving-pipeline-checkpoint-secret")

@app.cls(
    image=image,
    volumes={"/checkpoints": vol},
    secrets=[secret],
    min_containers=2
)
class ModelServer:
    @modal.enter()
    def load_model(self):
        import numpy as np
        self.model_path = "/checkpoints/model.npy"
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(self.model_path), exist_ok=True)
        
        if os.path.exists(self.model_path):
            self.model = np.load(self.model_path)
            print("Loaded model from checkpoint")
        else:
            self.model = np.random.rand(10, 10)
            np.save(self.model_path, self.model)
            vol.commit()
            print("Initialized new model and saved checkpoint")
            
        self.model_version = os.environ.get("MODEL_VERSION", "unknown")
        self.auth_token = os.environ.get("AUTH_TOKEN", "unknown")

    @modal.fastapi_endpoint(method="POST")
    def predict(self, data: dict):
        import numpy as np
        inputs = np.array(data.get("inputs", []))
        prediction = float(np.sum(inputs)) + float(np.sum(self.model))
        return {
            "prediction": prediction,
            "model_version": self.model_version,
            "auth_token_present": bool(self.auth_token)
        }

@app.function(image=image, volumes={"/checkpoints": vol})
def save_dummy_model():
    import numpy as np
    os.makedirs("/checkpoints", exist_ok=True)

    np.save("/checkpoints/model.npy", dummy)
    vol.commit()

@app.local_entrypoint()
def main():
    print("Saving dummy model checkpoint to volume...")
    save_dummy_model.remote()
    
    print("Performing test inference call...")
    url = ModelServer().predict.web_url
    if not url:
        url = ModelServer().predict.get_web_url()
    print("URL:", url)
    data = json.dumps({"inputs": [1, 2, 3]}).encode('utf-8')
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
    
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
        res = json.loads(response.read().decode())
    print("Inference result:", res)
    
    print("Populating operational metadata...")
    output_dict["model_version"] = "v1.0.0"
    output_dict["checkpoint_saved"] = "true"
    output_dict["endpoint_ready"] = "true"
    output_dict["warm_pool_size"] = "2"
    print("Done!")
